nl_query: Show all scripts where the scan was performed by a scanner device registered at a campus different from the campus where the exam was scheduled, indicating a potential logistics or data entry error.
failed_sql: SELECT sh.script_id, sh.scanned_at, sh.device_id, sd.device_name, au.code AS campus_code, au.name AS campus_name FROM scan_history sh JOIN scanner_device sd ON sd.id = sh.device_id JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id JOIN exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.exam_id::bigint = sh.script_id WHERE sd.campus_id != esc.campus_id ORDER BY sh.scanned_at DESC LIMIT 1000;
error: Execution error: invalid input syntax for type bigint: "EX2025_CS101_END"
